result.summary: Found 3 developer surfaces for agenta.ai: a project-scoped authenticated REST API on Agenta Cloud/self-hosted hosts, an authenticated OTLP HTTP ingest endpoint for observability, and a public documentation MCP server over SSE.

agenta_api_key.label: Agenta project API key
agenta_api_key.setup: Sign in to [Agenta Cloud](https://cloud.agenta.ai/) and create an API key from the Agenta UI. The REST API docs state that API keys are scoped to a single project, and the API reference includes a dedicated `Keys` section at [API Reference](https://agenta.ai/docs/reference/api/category). Use the resulting key as `Authorization: ApiKey YOUR_API_KEY`.

surfaces.name: Agenta OTLP HTTP ingest
surfaces.notes: Docs show OTLP/HTTP ingest under `https://cloud.agenta.ai/api/otlp` with traces endpoint examples at `https://cloud.agenta.ai/api/otlp/v1/traces`. This is the observability ingest surface, separate from the general REST API usage pattern.

variables.name: region
variables.description: Cloud docs list US base URL `https://us.cloud.agenta.ai/api` and EU base URL `https://eu.cloud.agenta.ai/api`; self-hosted uses `$AGENTA_HOST/api`.
